Pyr Badge Editor

Every badge is shown as editable content: center art, title, description, and prompt fields. All preview images load directly from this site, so the editor works on any machine for demos. Local folder access is only needed if you want to write files back into a working pyr folder.

200Total badges
100Building track
100Exploration track
0Duplicate names folded
Live Badge Ops

Command Center

Edit descriptions and prompts inline on each badge card. For demos, everything here runs in the browser with images served from GitHub Pages. If you want to bring changes back into production assets later, export or save updated manifest.json and center-image-prompts.csv.

Demo-ready: all badge images on this page are served from GitHub Pages. Pick a local pyr folder only if you want to save files back to disk; otherwise use the download buttons for export.

Direct saves update manifest.json and center-image-prompts.csv. For a browser-only demo on another machine, no local asset folder is required.

Site Update Queue
No saved site updates tracked yet.
Saved changes will show up here after you write them to disk.
Image Rerun Queue
No saved prompt changes waiting for image regeneration.
Badges with saved prompt changes will show up here with their rerun commands.

200 badges visible

No badges match that filter yet.
